Container.Name: ha-pass-invitations
Container.Overview:
Shareable, schedulable guest links for controlling specific Home Assistant entities - lights, locks, thermostats, fans, and more. Guests get a mobile-friendly PWA, no HA account or app install needed.
Fork of Rohithkadaveru/ha-pass adding: advance/recurring access windows (schedule a link today that only activates on a future date, or repeats weekly), automatic link delivery via any notify.* service, button/input_button support (for gate/door relay helper entities), local-network-only command execution for access-type domains (lock/cover/button/input_button - the link stays viewable from anywhere, but triggering the action requires being on the configured home network), and single-device link binding (the first browser to open a link claims it, so it can't be casually forwarded).
Requires an existing Home Assistant instance reachable from this container and a Long-Lived Access Token (HA Profile -> Security -> Long-Lived Access Tokens). This is a standalone Docker container, not a Home Assistant Supervisor add-on - it works with Home Assistant Core installs that don't have Supervisor/add-ons.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the admin dashboard and guest links

Config.Name: HA_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8123 (no trailing slash)

Config.Name: HA_TOKEN
Config.Description: Home Assistant Long-Lived Access Token (Profile -> Security -> Long-Lived Access Tokens)

Config.Name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password for the admin dashboard (min 8 characters)

Config.Name: TIMEZONE
Config.Description: IANA timezone used to evaluate recurring weekly access windows, e.g. Europe/Madrid

Config.Name: LOCAL_NETWORK_CIDRS
Config.Description: JSON array of CIDRs considered your home network, e.g. ["192.168.0.0/16"]. When set, guests can only trigger locks/covers/buttons while connected to one of these ranges. Leave empty for no restriction.

Config.Name: GUEST_URL
Config.Description: External base URL for guest links, e.g. https://guest.myhouse.com. Leave empty to use the local network address.

Config.Name: CONTACT_MESSAGE
Config.Default: Please request a new link from the person who shared this one.
Config.Description: Message shown when a guest link expires

Container.Config: Please request a new link from the person who shared this one.

Config.Name: ACCESS_LOG_RETENTION_DAYS
Config.Description: Days to keep guest access log entries

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal listen port (only change if you also change the WebUI Port mapping above)
